commands.review_summary:
Adds nonzero active-lease and monthly USD guardrail vars to production and preview Worker wrangler config, plus a Vitest regression test that keeps those vars set.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection rather than live deployment: current main's `worker/wrangler.jsonc` does not set the cost-cap vars, while `worker/src/usage.ts` already reads and enforces them when present. I did not run or deploy the Worker in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] Needs maintainer confirmation of cap values and deployment timing; there is no narrow code defect for an automated repair lane.
